publishedAbstract: * ODF upgrade process encountering issues during transition from version 4.18.X to 4.19.X * OSD Missing and/or failed to redeploy on bluestore `storeType` * The migration was requested in the rook-ceph-operator logs, but never completed
publishedTitle: Rook bluestore_rdr to bluestore Backing Store Migration Fails on CephCluster Confirmation - OpenShift Data Foundation (ODF)
